articles.title: Welcome!
articles.contents:
Hi! My name is Yevgen Ryeznik (Ukrainian🇺🇦: Євген Рєзнік).
I work as a statistician at AstraZeneca (Gothenburg, Sweden), where I provide statistical support for design and analysis of clinical trials.
Before joining the AstraZeneca, I worked at Uppsala University (Uppsala, Sweden), where I obtained a Ph.D. degree in Applied Mathematics and Statistics at the Center for Interdisciplinary Mathematics (CIM) in 2019. My supervisors were professor Warwick Tucker from the Department of Mathematics and professor Andrew Hooker from the Department of Pharmaceutical Biosciences, Pharmacometrics Research Group.
My detailed CV can be found here.
On this site, I write about mathematical and statistical problems and their solutions, which I have found to be interesting to me. Most of the solutions come with code in one of the following languages: R/Python/Julia.
Also, you can find here materials to several courses, which I teach/taught.

articles.title: Probability and statistics
articles.description: A series of lectures on selected topics of “Probability and Statistics” taught for Master/Ph.D. Students and Researchers at the Department of Pharmaceutical Biosciences, Uppsala University.

articles.title: Publications (2004 -- 2020)
articles.contents:
DOCTORAL THESIS
Ryeznik, Y. (2019) “Optimal Adaptive Designs and Adaptive Randomization Techniques for Clinical Trials”, Uppsala Dissertations in Mathematics, ISSN 1401-2049, 113, p. 94. http://uu.diva-portal.org/smash/record.jsf?pid=diva2%3A1291159&dswid=8852
PEER-REVIEWED PUBLICATIONS IN STATISTICAL AND MATHEMATICAL JOURNALS
Sverdlov, O., Ryeznik, Y., Wong W. K. (2020) “On Optimal Designs for Multi-Objective Clinical Trials: An Updated Review”, Journal of Statistical Theory and Practice, 14 (10). https://doi.org/10.1007/s42519-019-0073-4
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2019) “Ordinary Least Squares: the Adequacy of Linear Regression Solutions under Multicollinearity and without It”, The Problems of Economy, 1, pp. 217-227. https://doi.org/10.32983/2222-0712-2019-1-217-227
Sverdlov, O., Ryeznik, Y. (2019) “Implementing Unequal Randomization in Clinical Trials with Heterogeneous Tretament Cost”, Statistics in Medicine, 38 (16), pp. 2905-2927. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.8160
Ryeznik, Y., Sverdlov, O., Hooker, A. C. (2018) “Implementing Optimal Designs for Dose–Response Studies Through Adaptive Randomization for a Small Population Group”, The AAPS journal 20 (85). https://doi.org/10.1208/s12248-018-0242-5
Ryeznik Y., Sverdlov, O. (2018) “A Comparative Study of Restricted Randomization Procedures for Multi-Arm Trials with Equal or Unequal Treatment Allocation Ratios”, Statistics in Medicine 37(21), pp. 3056-3077. https://doi.org/10.1002/sim.7817
Ryeznik, Y., Sverdlov, O., Hooker, A. C. (2018) “Adaptive Optimal Designs for Dose-Finding Studies with Time-to-Event Outcomes”, The AAPS journal 20 (24). https://doi.org/10.1208/s12248-017-0166-5
Ryeznik, Y., Sverdlov, O., Wong W. K. (2015) “RARtool: A MATLAB Software Package for Designing Response-Adaptive Randomized Clinical Trials with Time-to-Event Outcomes”, Journal of statistical software 66 (1). https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v066.i01
Sverdlov, O., Ryeznik, Y., Wu, Sh. (2015) “Exact Bayesian inference comparing binomial proportions, with application to proof-of-concept clinical trials”, Therapeutic Innovation & Regulatory Science 49 (1), pp. 163-174. https://doi.org/10.1177/2168479014547420
Sverdlov, O., Ryeznik, Y., Wong, W. K. (2014) “Efficient and Ethical Response-Adaptive Randomization Designs for Multi-Arm Clinical Trials with Weibull Time-to-Event Outcomes”, Journal of Biopharmaceutical Statistics 24 (4), pp. 732-754. https://doi.org/10.1080/10543406.2014.903261
Sverdlov, O., Wong, W. K., Ryeznik, Y. (2014) “Adaptive clinical trial designs for phase I cancer studies.” Statistics Surveys 8, pp. 2-44. https://doi.org/10.1214/14-SS106
Sverdlov, O., Rosenberger, W. F., Ryeznik, Y. (2013) “Utility of covariate-adjusted response-adaptive randomization in survival trials.” Statistics in Biopharmaceutical Research 5 (1), pp. 38-53. https://doi.org/10.1080/19466315.2012.754376
Sverdlov, O., Ryeznik, Y., Wong, W. K. (2012) “Doubly-adaptive biased coin designs for balancing competing objectives in time-to-event trials” Statistics and Its Interface 5 (4), pp. 401-413. https://doi.org/10.4310/SII.2012.v5.n4.a3
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2010) “Peculiarities of electromagnetic wave scattering from water surface causing an anomalous effect” Telecommunications and Radio Engineering 69 (6), pp. 531-536. https://doi.org/10.1615/TelecomRadEng.v69.i6.70
Ryeznik, Y., Sukharevsky O. I., Tyzhnenko, A. G. (2008) “Detection of the scatterer’s form and size with multyfrequency radiolocation” The Bulletin of Kharkov National University 834, pp. 31–36. http://www-radiovestnik.univer.kharkov.ua/full/80.pdf (in Russian)
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik Y. (2008) “Potentially unbreacable ciphering on a hybrid physical-mathematical level”, The Bulletin of Kharkov National University 834, pp. 108-113. http://www-radiovestnik.univer.kharkov.ua/full/92.pdf
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2008) “Identification and localization of reflected pulses under strong noise” The Bulletin of Kharkov National University 806, pp. 70-74. http://www-radiovestnik.univer.kharkov.ua/full/67.pdf (in Russian).
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2007) “Scattering from sea surface leading spike effect” Radiotechnics 149, pp. 27-31. (in Russian).
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2007) “Estimation of accuracy of scattering field for 2D screens calculated with Method of Moments (MoM) in \(L_2\)” The Bulletin of Kharkov National University 756, pp. 65-70. http://www-radiovestnik.univer.kharkov.ua/1.php?nom=756 (in Russian)
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2007) “Estimates of accuracy and efficiency of a MoM algorithm in \(L_2\) for 2-D screens” Progress in Electromagnetics Research 71, pp. 295-316. https://doi.org/10.2528/PIER07030603
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2007) “Galerkin method solution as a reference solution for MoM algorithms in \(L_2\) for \(E\)-screens”, Journal of Applied Electromagnetism 9(1), pp. 27-44. Available for download at http://jae.ece.ntua.gr/archive/
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2005) "Convergent Galerkin MoM solution for 2-D H-scattering from screens’’ Electromagnetics 25 (4), pp. 329-341. https://doi.org/10.1080/02726340590936176
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2004) “Convergent Galerkin MoM solution to the hypersingular \(1^{st}\) kind integral equation for 2-D Neumann problem” Journal of Applied Elecromagnetism 6 (2), pp. 37-51. Available for download at http://jae.ece.ntua.gr/archive/
PEER-REVIEWED CONFERENCE PROCEEDINGS
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2007) “Scattering amplitude error analysis for the MoM schemes in \(L_2\) commonly used for solving a 2-D scattering from screens” The Sixth International Kharkov Symposium on Millimeter and Submillimeter Waves, MSMW-07, pp. 319-321, Kharkiv, Ukraine. https://doi.org/10.1109/MSMW.2007.4294648
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2006) “A new insight into a possible spike mechanism” International Conference on Mathematical Methods in Electromagnetics Theory, MMET-06, pp. 170-172, Kharkiv, Ukraine. https://doi.org/10.1109/MMET.2006.1689734
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. (2005) “A unique solution for \(H\)-scattering from 2-D roughness on a PEC plane” 18th International Conference on Applied Electromagnetic, ICECom-05, pp. 1-4, Dubrovnik, Croatia. https://doi.org/10.1109/ICECOM.2005.205032
CO-AUTHORED CONFERENCE PRESENTATIONS
“Adaptive dose finding for time-to-event outcomes with adaptive choice of patient number based on response rate” (with O. Sverdlov and A. C. Hooker). PAGE Meeting, Lisboa, Portugal, June 7-10, 2016. Slides available online at https://www.page-meeting.org/pdf_assets/5629-[07-JUNE-2016]%20PAGE2016_Main.pdf
“Adaptive Optimal Designs for Dose-Finding Studies with Time-to-Event Outcomes on Continuous Dose Space” (with O. Sverdlov and A. C. Hooker). SIAM Conference on Uncertainty Quantification, Lausanne, Switzerland, April 5-8, 2016. Abstract available online at http://meetings.siam.org/sess/dsp_talk.cfm?p=75159
“Adaptive designs for dose finding clinical trials with time-to-event outcomes” (with O. Sverdlov and A. C. Hooker). PAGE Meeting, Hersonissos, Crete, Greece, June 2-5, 2015. Poster available online at https://www.page-meeting.org/pdf_assets/3298-YR_PAGE_2015_Poster_Final.pdf
“Development of software for simulation and implementation of response-adaptive time-to-event trials” (with O. Sverdlov and W. K. Wong). Joint Statistical Meetings (JSM), San Diego CA, July 28-August 2, 2012. Abstract available online at http://www.amstat.org/meetings/jsm/2012/onlineprogram/AbstractDetails.cfm?abstractid=304097
“Efficient and ethical adaptive randomization designs for multi-armed clinical trials with Weibull time-to-event outcomes” (with O. Sverdlov and W. K. Wong). The 20th Applied Statistics Symposium, International Chinese Statistical Association (ICSA), New York City, June 26-29, 2011. Program and abstract available online at http://www.icsa.org/2011/online_files/abstractsBook.pdf
“Covariate-adjusted response-adaptive randomization designs for phase III survival trials” (with O. Sverdlov). XVII Biostatistics Applied Symposium (BASS), Hilton Head, SC, 2010. Slides available online at http://bass.georgiasouthern.edu/PDFs/BASS_2010_Alex_Sverdlov.pdf
BOOKS AND TUTORIALS:
Malyarets, L. M., Ryeznik, Y., Sinkevych, B. V. (2013) “Modern optimization techniques in MatLab. Part II”, practice tutorial, Kharkov National University of Economics, 356 pages. (in Ukrainian).
Malyarets, L. M., Ryeznik, Y., Sinkevych, B. V. (2011) “Modern optimization techniques in MatLab. Part I”, practice tutorial, Kharkov National University of Economics, 360 pages. (in Ukrainian)
Vietlugina, I. V., Dubovyk, K. M., Kaydash, M. V., Mysyura, Y. Y., Ryeznik, Y. V., Sylichova, T. V. (2009) “Mathematics for economists with MatLab”, laboratory practice tutorial, Kharkov National University of Economics, 220 pages. (in Ukrainian)
Malyarets, L. M., Ryeznik, Y. V., Tyzhnenko, A. G. (2008) “Mathematics for economists using MatLab”, tutorial, Kharkov National University of Economics, 210 pages. (in Ukrainian)
Tyzhnenko, A. G., Ryeznik, Y. V. (2007) “Methodical recommendations to implementation scientific research on higher mathematics using MatLab”, Kharkov National University of Economics, 116 pages. (in Ukrainian)
Ryeznik, Y. V. (2006) “Practical training on higher mathematics using MatLab”, chapters 1-3, Kharkov National University of Economics, 192 pages. (in Ukrainian).

articles.title: Teaching
articles.description: There is a list of university courses, which I taught at [Uppsala University](https://uu.se).
articles.contents:
Autumn 2019: Probability and statistics – a series of lectures on selected topics of “Probability and Statistics” for Master/Ph.D. Students and researchers at the Department of Pharmaceutical Biosciences, Uppsala University.
Spring 2019: Innovative clinical trials - Connecting theory and practice through adaptive designs and digital development – a Master/Ph.D. level course at the Center for Interdisciplinary Mathematics – CIM, Uppsala University.
Spring 2018: Optimal designs and randomization techniques for clinical trials – a Master/Ph.D. level course at the Center for Interdisciplinary Mathematics – CIM, Uppsala University.
